title: Can you turn off profile badges?
excerpt:
Can you turn off “badges” that show up on profile icons?  I have this one 
 showing as a “champ” badge and I can’t find anywhere to disable

posts.author: KarenC2 (Karen Curtis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can you turn off “badges” that show up on profile icons? I have this one
showing as a “champ” badge and I can’t find anywhere to disable
